ChangeRequest.name: Institutional sector - derived attributes
ChangeRequest.comment:
### Overview
The LDM includes two derived attributes:
* `Institutional sector according to EBA ITS` * `Institutional sector according to SHS`
The two variables are wrongly assigned the whole institutional sector domain instead of their specific domain. However looking in the sdd I found the the two subdomains:
* https://sdd.ecb.de/view/Subdomain/2007773320690 * https://sdd.ecb.de/view/Subdomain/2007773320623
From what I can see, the two subdomains just include aggregated members (e.g. households s14) therefore I presume the derivation would be just an aggregation, although the EBA ITS subdomain has members that are not in the LDM domain (e.g. General government including international organisations S13_IO)
I would propose to delete this two variables if they are not used (`Institutional sector according to EBA ITS` is not used for Finrep generation rules).
Additionally the aggregated member **Households, extended to the rest of the world (s14)** in the institutional sector domain is redundant as there are already:
* Households that are sole proprietorships/partnerships without legal status: Sole proprietorships and partnerships without legal status included in the sector S.14, as defined in Regulation (EU) No 549/2013 (paragraphs 2.118 to 2.121 of Annex A), extended to the rest of the world (S14_A) * Households other than sole proprietorships/partnerships without legal status: It corresponds to sector S.14, as defined in Regulation (EU) No 549/2013 (paragraphs 2.118 to 2.121 of Annex A), extended to the rest of the world, other than sole proprietorships and partnerships without legal status (S14_B)
therefore I propose to delete it.
In case the variables are not deleted the domains need to be updated accordingly.
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli
### Description of change request
_Two options:_
1. Delete variables `Institutional sector according to EBA ITS` and `Institutional sector according to SHS` 2. Update the domain of `Institutional sector according to EBA ITS` and `Institutional sector according to SHS`
Independently from the options delete the member **Households, extended to the rest of the world (s14)** from institutional domain
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* `Institutional sector according to EBA ITS` and `Institutional sector according to SHS` in `Party derived data` entity * Institutional sector domain
### Forward Engineering considerations
_\[Other considerations\]_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
